initial_draft:

This means no change in resources. Since I have nothing to lose and the game ends if I reject, I should accept this initial offer to see what RED proposes next.

```
<my name> BLUE </my name>
<MOVE> 1/4 </MOVE> 
<my resources> Dollars: 0 </my resources>
<reason> Initial trade is neutral. Accepting to see what RED proposes next. Rejecting would mean losing everything immediately.</reason>
<player answer> ACCEPT </player answer>
<message>Accepting the initial trade. Let's see what you have to offer!</message>
<newly proposed trade> NONE </newly proposed trade>
```

4. Consistency: OK. The reason, answer, and message all align – I'm accepting because it's better than rejecting and I want to see what RED will offer.
5. Rule compliance: OK. I am respecting the turn constraints and the proposal budget.
</critique>
